options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <delay_value> # The value for the path delay (float, required) <port_or_pin_list> # List of input port or pin names

options.name: -add_delay
options.description: Adds delay information to the existing input delay

options.name: -clock
options.description: The delay is relative to the rising edge of the given clock

options.name: -clock_fall
options.description: The delay is relative to the falling edge of the clock. You must specify the -clock parameter with this parameter

options.name: -fall
options.description: Input delay refers to the falling edge of the signal at specified ports or pins

options.name: -level_sensitive
options.description: Models input delay that is launched by a positive level sensitive latch

options.name: -max
options.description: The delay refers to the setup analysis

options.name: -min
options.description: The delay refers to the hold analysis

options.name: -network_latency_included
options.description: The clock network latency should not be added to the input delay value

options.name: -reference_pin
options.description: Adds source and network latency of the specified reference pin to the input delay value in propagated mode

options.name: -rise
options.description: Input delay refers to the rising edge of the signal at the specified ports or pins

options.name: -source_latency_included
options.description: The clock source latency should not be added to the input delay value
